description: Manage Grok accounts, login, and switch for Pier.

en.name: Grok Account Management
en.description: Manage Grok accounts, login, and switch for Pier.

pier.grok.accounts.title: Grok Account & Quota
pier.grok.accounts.description: Switch the active Grok account and monitor its quota.

messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.title: Grok Accounts
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogDes: Choose how to add a Grok account. Browser login and device code use the Grok CLI; API keys and local import use credentials already on this device.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogLoc: Credentials are stored only on this device
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogOau: Open Grok login in your browser. The account appears here automatically after authorization.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogDev: Use device-code login when browser OAuth is unavailable.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogApi: Store an xAI API key for this account. Active API-key accounts clear the Grok session token so the key can take effect in sessions that supply XAI_API_KEY.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogWai: Complete Grok login. This dialog closes automatically after authorization.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.switchConfir: New Grok sessions will use this account. Restart any Grok sessions that are already running for the change to take effect.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.removeConfir: This account will be removed from Pier. Credentials stored for this account are deleted.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.emptyDesc: Add a Grok account to get started.
messages.pier.grok.widget.title: Grok Account
messages.pier.grok.errors.cliNotFound: Grok CLI not found on PATH
messages.pier.grok.errors.noIdentity: Login completed but no identity found
messages.pier.grok.errors.apiKeyQuotaUnsupported: API key accounts cannot report Grok quota — switch to an OIDC account
messages.pier.grok.errors.removeActiveBlocked: Cannot remove the active account — select another first
messages.pier.grok.errors.billingUnavailable: Could not load Grok quota. Try refresh, or re-login if the session expired.
messages.pier.grok.errors.accessDenied: This Grok account cannot access billing for this product.
messages.pier.grok.errors.pluginNotReady: Grok plugin is still starting — try again in a moment
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersTit: Sync Grok account to other tools?
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersBod: Write this Grok account's xAI credentials into the selected tools. Already-running sessions in those tools may need a restart.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersFai: Couldn't sync credentials to the selected tools. Try again after opening those tools once.
Couldn't sync credentials to OMP. Make sure OMP is installed and has been opened at least once on this device.
Couldn't sync credentials to OpenCode. Make sure OpenCode is installed on this device.
Couldn't sync credentials to Pi. Make sure Pi is installed on this device. For login accounts, Pi needs a Grok API-key account (or XAI_API_KEY) because it has no xAI OAuth support.
Select a managed Grok account first, then try syncing again.
Select at least one tool to sync.
messages.pier.grok.switch.syncSectionLabel: Also switch the Grok account in:
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogAcc: Recommended: continue in your browser to sign in with the Grok CLI. Use device code only when a browser is unavailable. The account appears here after authorization.
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogLoc: Import the account already signed in on this device (~/.grok/auth.json). It becomes the active Pier account.
messages.pier.grok.errors.noLocalLogin: No valid local Grok login found. Sign in with the Grok CLI first.

zh-CN.name: Grok 账号管理
zh-CN.description: 在 Pier 中管理 Grok 账号、登录与切换。

pier.grok.accounts.title: Grok 账号与配额
pier.grok.accounts.description: 切换当前 Grok 账号并查看对应配额。

messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.title: Grok 账号
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogDes: 选择添加方式。浏览器登录与设备码走 Grok CLI；API key 与本地导入使用本机已有凭据。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogLoc: 凭据仅保存在这台设备上
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogOau: 在浏览器中打开 Grok 登录。完成授权后，此账号会自动出现在 Pier 中。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogDev: 在无法使用浏览器 OAuth 时，使用设备码登录。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogApi: 为此账号保存 xAI API key。激活 API key 账号时会清空 Grok 会话令牌，以便在提供 XAI_API_KEY 的会话中生效。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogWai: 完成 Grok 登录。授权完成后此对话框会自动关闭。
正在等待 Grok 返回授权结果…
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.switchConfir: 新启动的 Grok 会话将使用此账号。当前运行中的会话需重新启动后生效。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.removeConfir: 该账号将从 Pier 中移除，并删除此账号在 Pier 中保存的凭据。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.emptyDesc: 添加一个 Grok 账号以开始使用。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.loadFailed: 无法加载 Grok 账号
messages.pier.grok.widget.title: Grok 账号
messages.pier.grok.widget.loadFailed: 无法加载 Grok 账号
messages.pier.grok.errors.cliNotFound: 未在 PATH 中找到 Grok CLI
messages.pier.grok.errors.noIdentity: 登录完成但未找到身份信息
messages.pier.grok.widget.refreshFailed: 无法刷新 Grok 用量
messages.pier.grok.errors.apiKeyQuotaUnsupported: API key 账号无法报告 Grok 配额 — 请切换到 OIDC 账号
messages.pier.grok.errors.removeActiveBlocked: 不能移除当前账号 — 请先切换到其他账号
messages.pier.grok.errors.billingUnavailable: 无法加载 Grok 配额。请重试刷新；若会话过期请重新登录。
messages.pier.grok.errors.sessionExpired: Grok 会话已过期，请重新登录
messages.pier.grok.errors.accessDenied: 当前 Grok 账号无权访问该产品的计费/配额信息。
messages.pier.grok.errors.pluginNotReady: Grok 插件仍在启动，请稍后再试
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersTit: 同步 Grok 账号到其他工具？
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersBod: 将当前 Grok 账号的 xAI 凭证写入所选工具。这些工具里已在运行的会话可能需要重启后生效。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersSuc: 已同步凭证到所选工具
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.syncPeersFai: 无法同步凭证到所选工具。请先打开这些工具一次后再试。
无法同步凭证到 OMP。请确认本机已安装 OMP，并至少打开过一次。
无法同步凭证到 OpenCode。请确认本机已安装 OpenCode。
无法同步凭证到 Pi。请确认本机已安装 Pi。登录类账号无法同步：Pi 不支持 xAI OAuth，请改用 Grok API key 账号或设置 XAI_API_KEY。
请先选择一个受管 Grok 账号，再尝试同步。
请至少选择一个要同步的工具。
messages.pier.grok.switch.syncSectionLabel: 同时切换以下工具的 Grok 账号：
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogAcc: 推荐：通过 Grok CLI 在浏览器中登录；仅在无法打开浏览器时使用设备码。授权完成后，账号会自动出现在这里。
messages.pier.grok.accounts.settings.addDialogLoc: 导入本机已登录的账号（~/.grok/auth.json），并设为 Pier 当前账号。
messages.pier.grok.errors.noLocalLogin: 本机未找到有效的 Grok 登录。请先用 Grok CLI 登录。

workbenchWidgets.description: Switch the active Grok account and monitor its quota.
workbenchWidgets.title: Grok Account & Quota
